title: The Anti-Entity Group

[[File:Anti-EntityAgencyLogo.png|center|300px|link=]]
'''The Anti-Entity Group'''
''May the behemoths of this hell fall before humanity.''
Who We Are
We are the Anti-Entity Group — a powerful organization dedicated to eradicating every monster of this wretched hell, whether it be a common entity or a god. We are a group of over 200 members, all dedicated to this specific cause since 1992. With heavily armed troops dispersed throughout the Backrooms, we pave the way for humanity's safe future — one without monsters lurking in the dark, monsters outside our windows, and so forth. Seek. Purge. Eradicate. We are the Anti-Entity Group — humanity's lantern in the pervading darkness.
Our Progenitor
We derived from the Anti-Entity Agency, a group long dissolved from causes we wish not to elaborate on. Founded in 1950 for the same purpose, they wreaked havoc on the murderous beings that have tortured humanity since the first man fell into the Backrooms. Though the Anti-Entity Agency had fewer members than us, its influence spanned the entire Core Eight — from the arachnid-ridden depths of the Cave System to the ever-permeating darkness of the Black Depths. The Agency reached a crescendo in its power when it successfully expanded its power beyond the Core Eight, soon establishing outposts in the Wheat Fields, the Military Hospital, et cetera. Following the Agency's fall in 1988, the remaining members went their separate ways. However, the message left behind by the expired organization lingered, and the task was taken once more.
Where We Reside
Our bases are scattered around the Main Nine, specifically levels with moderate entity concentrations. While most of our bases are classified, we have set up outposts dubbed "Waypoints" — publicly accessible establishments that will accept lost wanderers under the condition that they serve for some time. However, due to the limitations of our technology, we tend to avoid locations of extreme entity counts as well as locations of invulnerable entities.

Alliances
Due to our mission revolving in extreme controversy, we rarely make contact with other organizations. However, the Anti-Entity Group has established a few light alliances.
'''The Entity Recycling Association'''
We established ties with the Entity Recycling Association in the early 2000s. Our connection is simple. We give the Association a small portion of our spare entity parts, and they give us resources.
'''The Party Crashers'''
Our connection is nothing more than an agreement to assist each other in exterminating all Jovials found throughout the Backrooms. While the Anti-Entity Group does occasionally help with raids, we remain neutral.
'''Authorial Information'''
